description_long: This object is a classic wooden directional signpost featuring two arrow-shaped boards mounted perpendicularly on a central vertical pole. The arrows are simple, with pointed ends and flat backs, and are positioned at different heights to indicate multiple directions. The pole is cylindrical and tapers slightly at the top, giving it a traditional, rustic appearance. The sign is unadorned, with no visible text or symbols, and the wood has a dark, matte finish. The construction appears sturdy, suitable for outdoor use in parks, trails, or urban walkways. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on clear directional guidance.
description: A dark wooden signpost with two arrow-shaped boards pointing in different directions, mounted on a vertical pole. The sign is simple, sturdy, and lacks any visible text or symbols.
description_view_0: Front view showing both arrow boards clearly, with the upper arrow pointing left and the lower arrow pointing right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the boards and the cylindrical shape of the pole, with the arrows aligned front-to-back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of both arrows and the central pole, with the arrows' points facing away.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the arrows' profiles and the pole's roundness, with the arrows aligned back-to-front.
